title: Weaponery
description: Adds 22 new unique weapons including  swords, axes, daggers and hammers with unique abilities.
body:
![Weaponery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a991564b9d0d88ee027d96bba06bc205476830a.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/p-6gUDzYC1k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Adds 22 new unique weapons including swords, axes, daggers and hammers with unique abilities.
![Weapons textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74685d5fc5dd4c246cb35691cc2f960d30ef55a5.png)

List of all the weapons it adds:
